prediction_label: Group by county and find max
Jurisdiction having a record on that date
Jurisdiction having an NTL image on that date
Filter by storm strength only (date duration abstracted)

sparql_query:
PREFIX goo: <https://ucf-henat.github.io/GeoOutageOnto/#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?county ?svi2000 ?svi2010 ?svi2022 (?pop2022 - ?pop2000 AS ?popChange) ?poverty2022 WHERE {
  ?county goo:locatedInState ?state .
  ?state rdfs:label "Florida" .
  ?svi22 a goo:SVIRecord ; goo:representsCounty ?county ; goo:sviYear 2022 ; goo:sviHousingTransportationTheme ?ht2022 ; goo:sviOverallScore ?svi2022 ; goo:totalPopulation ?pop2022 ; goo:povertyRate ?poverty2022 .
  ?svi10 a goo:SVIRecord ; goo:representsCounty ?county ; goo:sviYear 2010 ; goo:sviOverallScore ?svi2010 .
  ?svi00 a goo:SVIRecord ; goo:representsCounty ?county ; goo:sviYear 2000 ; goo:sviOverallScore ?svi2000 ; goo:totalPopulation ?pop2000 .
} ORDER BY DESC(?ht2022) LIMIT 10
